Free tools SEO Tools AI Writing Tools SEO Browser Extension Word Count ↗ Pricing Enterprise Sign in Sign up Ahrefs Plans & pricing From first projects to enterprise scale, Ahrefs’ plans help your business stay discoverable in search, AI, and beyond—powered by the world’s second-most active crawler and 10+ years of web-scale data . Pay annually, save up to 17% Lite Essential data for small businesses and personal projects. Standard Perfect for freelance SEOs and marketing consultants. Advanced More tools and data for lean in-house marketing teams. Get started from $199/mo Learn more ↗ Custom prompt packages Need to track your own prompts only? Subscribe to a package. Tracking one prompt on one platform in one location uses 1 check. Overage is billed at the end of the billing month. Basic E.g. 80 prompts daily on 1 platform $50/mo +2,500 checks/mo Overage $0.020/check billed monthly Get started Growth E.g. 100 prompts daily on 2 platforms $100/mo +7,000 checks/mo Overage $0.015/check billed monthly Get started Scale High volume, lowest per-check rate $250/mo +25,000 checks/mo Overage $0.010/check billed monthly Get started Optional add-ons Designed to take your plan further with deeper data, advanced AI, and added control.
